LanguageData.VBE_GeneModdedBeauty.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] è il prodotto di una delle cliniche cosmetiche più lussuose del vecchio mondo. Durante la vita di [PAWN_possessive], [PAWN_pronoun] ha speso un'indicibile fortuna in look da [PAWN_possessive] e ha avuto poco tempo per praticare qualcosa di più pratico.
LanguageData.VBE_ShipsNavigator.title: Navigatore del convoglio
LanguageData.VBE_ShipsNavigator.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] tracciava le rotte dei convogli a lungo raggio che si muovevano attraverso le terre desolate e lungo i pericolosi corridoi del vecchio mondo. [PAWN_pronoun] aveva una straordinaria capacità di trovare i percorsi più sicuri e veloci, anche se [PAWN_pronoun] aveva difficoltà con compiti meccanici e spesso li lasciava ad altri.
LanguageData.VBE_EngineRoomTech.baseDesc: In qualità di tecnico della sala reattore, [PAWN_nameDef] ha mantenuto in funzione gli impianti a lungo raggio e i generatori di insediamenti. [PAWN_pronoun] poteva risolvere quasi tutto con gli strumenti giusti, ma [PAWN_pronoun] mancava di precisione nelle interazioni sociali ed evitava compiti che richiedevano un tocco gentile.
LanguageData.VBE_GalacticMedic.title: Medico del convoglio
LanguageData.VBE_GalacticMedic.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] ha prestato servizio come medico per un convoglio a lungo raggio, curando di tutto, dalle malattie da radiazioni alle ferite da incidente su autostrade dissestate. La conoscenza di [PAWN_possessive] in medicina era impareggiabile, ma [PAWN_pronoun] non aveva la testa per la ricerca o per teorie complesse.
LanguageData.VBE_CargoHandler.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] era responsabile della gestione degli scali merci e dei manifesti dei convogli, garantendo che le forniture fossero stivate in modo sicuro e che l'inventario fosse accuratamente monitorato. [PAWN_pronoun] era fisicamente forte e altamente organizzato, ma [PAWN_pronoun] aveva poca pazienza per la documentazione dettagliata o le attività accademiche.
LanguageData.VBE_GalleyChef.title: Cuoco del convoglio
LanguageData.VBE_GalleyChef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] ha nutrito un convoglio a lungo raggio, trasformando gli ingredienti recuperati in pasti abbondanti per l'equipaggio. Cucinare in movimento presentava le sue sfide, ma [PAWN_pronoun] padroneggiava l'arte. Tuttavia, [PAWN_pronoun] non si è mai adattato bene ai macchinari, preferendo le pentole ai motori.
LanguageData.VBE_BloodlineFounder.title: L'erede del fondatore
LanguageData.VBE_BloodlineFounder.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] aveva origini ferocemente contestate, e nessuno era disposto ad ammettere il legame di [PAWN_possessive] con la stirpe di un potente fondatore. In qualche modo, [PAWN_pronoun] portava ancora l'eredità di un vecchio regime e quando quei diritti vennero alla luce, improvvisamente tutti vollero un pezzo di ciò che restava.
LanguageData.VBE_DeposedRoyalty.title: Signore della guerra deposto
LanguageData.VBE_DeposedRoyalty.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] si sono ritagliati un dominio che abbraccia tutta la regione attraverso un conflitto brutale, rifiutandosi di cedere il diritto delle persone [PAWN_possessive] a vivere senza oppressione. Alla fine, le fazioni rivali hanno unito le forze per infrangere il dominio [PAWN_possessive] e le guardie del corpo [PAWN_possessive] hanno costretto [PAWN_objective] a fuggire. Anche se [PAWN_pronoun] ha fatto tutto il possibile per garantire un futuro alle persone [PAWN_possessive], non riuscire a proteggerle rimane la vergogna più grande di [PAWN_possessive].
LanguageData.VQE_TheGeneral.description: [PAWN_nameDef] ha coordinato l'Operazione: Deadlife da un bunker di continuità sepolto, convinto che un mondo in rovina potesse ancora essere governato se le persone giuste sopravvivessero di sotto. Quando le bombe caddero, [PAWN_pronoun] sigillò il complesso di comando, razionò i sopravvissuti e continuò a impartire ordini anche molto tempo dopo che la catena di comando era morta. Le radiazioni, l'età e i trattamenti di conservazione d'emergenza hanno lasciato [PAWN_objective] un demone pensante in uniforme, metà sostenuto dalla medicina e metà dall'ossessione. [PAWN_pronoun] attende ancora nella sala di controllo, pronto a completare l'ordine di lancio finale.
LanguageData.VQE_TheGeneral.title: il sorvegliante
LanguageData.VQE_InventorGenetronAdulthood.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] è diventato famoso tra gli ingegneri per aver progettato un prototipo di sistema di fusione destinato a ripristinare intere reti regionali. Spinto da un incessante bisogno di risolvere catastrofiche carenze energetiche, [PAWN_pronoun] ha spinto la ricerca pericolosa più lontano di quanto chiunque altro avrebbe osato. I primi test sui reattori furono affrettati e instabili, e gli incidenti che seguirono costarono molte vite. Quei fallimenti non si sono mai fermati [PAWN_objective]; hanno rafforzato la convinzione [PAWN_possessive] che il lavoro dovesse essere finito. Dopo innumerevoli revisioni, [PAWN_nameDef] ha prodotto il prototipo che ha reso [PAWN_objective] un eroe per alcuni e un visionario spericolato per altri.
LanguageData.VQE_InventorGenetronAdulthood.title: ingegnere del restauro
LanguageData.Spaceports_ShuttlePilot.description: [PAWN_nameDef], un veterano pilota di vertibird della Confraternita, ha trasportato pattuglie, feriti, merci e dignitari affrontando il tempo e gli spari. [PAWN_pronoun] mantiene la calma, conosce la disciplina della linea di volo e sa scambiare storie con grugniti e pezzi grossi in egual misura.
LanguageData.Spaceports_ShuttlePilot.title: Pilota di Vertibird
LanguageData.Architect28.description: [PAWN_nameDef] designed the construction of buildings. Back home, the technical calculations were handled by automated systems while the labour was done by work crews and machines. This freed [PAWN_objective] up to push the artistic limits of the craft, but also meant [PAWN_pronoun] never had to get [PAWN_possessive] hands dirty.
LanguageData.ArtsPatron54.description: [PAWN_nameDef] managed [PAWN_possessive] family's investments in the arts. \n[PAWN_pronoun] chose artists to patronize and worked with them to produce the expressions that most glorified [PAWN_possessive] family, their church, and the ruling order itself.
LanguageData.BiosphereManager95.description: [PAWN_nameDef] lived in a wealthy sealed resort where robots handled the menial work and the residents devoted themselves to leisure. [PAWN_pronoun] managed the plant and animal life of a sprawling park where guests came to admire nature's beauty.
LanguageData.CaveworldIlluminator95.description: Among tunnel-dwellers, those with vision as strong as [PAWN_nameDef]'s were revered as guides. [PAWN_pronoun] led the way through the dark, marking good digging spots with fungus lanterns and warning others of danger.
LanguageData.CaveworldIlluminator95.title: cave guide
LanguageData.CaveworldTender26.description: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up in a cave settlement deep beneath the surface of an inhospitable region. [PAWN_pronoun] worked with the other children tending the settlement's fungus crops.
LanguageData.CaveworldTender26.title: cave tender
LanguageData.CaveworldTunneler48.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked as a digger in a massive underground cave network. \n[PAWN_pronoun] knows rock so well that [PAWN_pronoun] can almost navigate caves by smell.
LanguageData.CaveworldTunneler48.title: cave tunneler
LanguageData.CharityWorker36.description: The richest old-world communities lived in comfort while nearby slums starved. [PAWN_nameDef] spent [PAWN_possessive] life appealing for donations and supporting those in need.
LanguageData.Chef52.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was the star chef at a high-class resort restaurant. [PAWN_pronoun] was famous among patrons for [PAWN_possessive] creative culinary specialties, and infamous among the kitchen staff for [PAWN_possessive] casual disdain for grunt work.
LanguageData.CombatEngineer30.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was recruited by the military as an engineer and set to work improving the army's vertibirds and armored carriers. The harsh training taught [PAWN_objective] how to build and repair military vehicles and structures. \nOne mission left [PAWN_nameDef] with pyrophobia and a strong desire to avoid plants.
LanguageData.CountryLordling92.description: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up in a privileged Enclave family estate in Appalachia. [PAWN_possessive] early years were filled with lessons in etiquette, politics, and Whitespring traditions. [PAWN_nameDef] and [PAWN_possessive] friends found ways to sneak out and explore the forests beyond the compound.
LanguageData.CountryLordling92.title: Enclave country scion
LanguageData.FeyCustomChildhood.description: Growing up sheltered in a vast old-world arcology, [PAWN_nameDef] distracted [PAWN_objective]self by playing wargames and painting miniatures. While [PAWN_pronoun] was never very good at the game itself, it helped connect [PAWN_objective] with others.
LanguageData.GlitterworldEmpath26.description: [PAWN_nameDef] found it easy to relate to others and mediate conflict. [PAWN_pronoun] was selected for a government emotional training program. The training intensified [PAWN_possessive] natural abilities, but [PAWN_pronoun] became unable to cause others pain.
LanguageData.GlitterworldEmpath26.title: trained empath
LanguageData.GlitterworldOfficer60.description: Though [PAWN_nameDef]'s posting was comfortable, [PAWN_possessive] unit stayed ready for war. [PAWN_nameDef] pursued artistic hobbies in [PAWN_possessive] off hours, but [PAWN_possessive] subordinates preferred to settle disputes with their fists, so [PAWN_nameDef] got good at breaking up fights.
LanguageData.GlitterworldOfficer60.title: garrison officer
LanguageData.GlitterworldSurgeon15.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked as a surgeon in a wealthy district mostly free of disease and hardship, so [PAWN_possessive] job focused on elaborate and creative cosmetic procedures. \n[PAWN_pronoun] understands human biology deeply, but has never had to remove a tumour or a bullet under battlefield conditions.
LanguageData.GlitterworldSurgeon15.title: cosmetic surgeon
LanguageData.IllegalShipwright76.description: There is a law that says you are not allowed to bolt heavy plasma emitters onto a cargo hauler, especially if you hide them under what looks like a communications rig for a cleaner ambush. [PAWN_nameDef] discovered that there is great profit to be made from customers who do not care about these laws.
LanguageData.ImperialInquisitor53.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked as a military police officer within the Whitespring, hunting unorthodox thought and dissent. \n[PAWN_nameDef] exposed and punished deviance to maintain order and the enclave's research priorities.
LanguageData.ImperialInquisitor53.title: Whitespring military police
LanguageData.ImperialPriest24.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was a lawyer in the Whitespring division. \n[PAWN_pronoun] spent half [PAWN_possessive] time studying laws and the role of the order within enclave doctrine. The other half was spent preaching discipline and loyalty.
LanguageData.ImperialPriest24.title: Whitespring lawyer
LanguageData.JoywireArtist8.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked in a city lab developing neural entertainment software to maximize user pleasure. \nWhen the local government imposed harsh restrictions on the product, [PAWN_pronoun] began selling [PAWN_possessive] designs on the black market.
LanguageData.JoywireArtist8.title: neural entertainment designer
LanguageData.LiamCustomAdulthood.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked in a comfortable research district developing hyper-realistic war simulations.
LanguageData.LiamCustomChildhood.description: Born and raised in a wealthy enclave district, [PAWN_nameDef] became obsessed with simulation software. [PAWN_pronoun] spent far too much time plugged in.
LanguageData.MateCustomAdulthood.description: After being laid off by a giant old-world corporation, [PAWN_nameDef] spent several years disillusioned and fighting alcohol addiction. \n[PAWN_pronoun] ended up busking aboard a battered cargo hauler, playing a beaten-up guitar and entertaining the crew with blues and folk songs from the distant past.
LanguageData.NavyScientist52.description: Modern wars are won by technology, so old-world naval labs hoarded the best equipment they could find. [PAWN_nameDef] worked in one of those labs, studying captured prototypes and strange relics hauled in from distant expeditions.
LanguageData.Novelist7.description: [PAWN_nameDef] lived in a prosperous pre-war city, penning wildly successful novels. [PAWN_pronoun] lived a carefree lifestyle, spending [PAWN_possessive] days writing and [PAWN_possessive] nights partying, and has never done a day's manual labour in [PAWN_possessive] life.
LanguageData.OskarCustomAdulthood.description: [PAWN_nameDef] designed combat modifications for frontline soldiers. \nOne night, in a nightmare, [PAWN_nameDef] was confronted by all the men and women killed by [PAWN_possessive] work. [PAWN_pronoun] decided to head into the wastes and use [PAWN_possessive] skills for good.
LanguageData.OskarCustomChildhood.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was born on the dark edge of a sprawling industrial city. After an argument, [PAWN_possessive] father sold [PAWN_objective] to a local boss as a slave artist. \nForced to create art or be punished, [PAWN_pronoun] withdrew and became unable to form relations with others.
LanguageData.RoyalCook18.description: [PAWN_nameDef] made meals for Whitespring patrons. \nOnly the finest food was acceptable, so [PAWN_nameDef] tended a small garden on the compound grounds to get the freshest herbs and vegetables. [PAWN_pronoun] fell in love with the food [PAWN_objective]self.
LanguageData.RoyalCook18.title: Whitespring cook
LanguageData.RoyalMasseuse43.description: [PAWN_nameDef] served wealthy Whitespring patrons as a massage artist. [PAWN_pronoun] serviced many members of the enclave and their guests. \n[PAWN_nameDef] occasionally offered something extra, if the patron was in the mood. Advancing in this line of work meant having refined social skills.
LanguageData.RoyalMasseuse43.title: Whitespring masseuse
LanguageData.Scout44.description: Born to the administrators of a remote government outpost, [PAWN_nameDef] was enrolled in a youth program that taught military scouting skills. \n[PAWN_pronoun] learned to survive in the wilderness, to obey, and not to ask questions.
LanguageData.Sculptor63.description: [PAWN_nameDef] started off sculpting person-sized artworks, but [PAWN_pronoun] soon began to think bigger. With the help of industrial equipment, [PAWN_pronoun] learned how to carve huge monuments out of cliffsides. Soon the parks and promenades of the city where [PAWN_pronoun] lived were full of giant stone figures.
LanguageData.ShipboundLordling12.description: [PAWN_nameDef]'s family held their power base in a grand, ancient command bunker. Born and raised inside it, [PAWN_nameDef] learned all about sealed-facility life, as well as the politics and methods of siege warfare and bunker assaults. \n[PAWN_pronoun] learned to feel most at home with strong walls close on all sides and the gentle hiss of air scrubbers.
LanguageData.ShipboundLordling12.title: bunker lordling
LanguageData.ShipBoy89.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was born to low-ranked servants in an ancient command bunker. The bunker mainframe was like a third parent to [PAWN_objective], and the maintenance crew [PAWN_pronoun] worked for was like a second family. \n[PAWN_nameDef] rarely saw plants or animals, and still finds them unnerving to touch.
LanguageData.ShipBoy89.title: bunker boy
LanguageData.Shipcracker37.description: [PAWN_nameDef]'s role was to blast into fortified bunkers, punch through the interior defenses, and conquer them in room-to-room combat. [PAWN_pronoun] became very good at wielding heavy breaching weapons to cut both steel and flesh. \n[PAWN_pronoun] also developed a taste for the drugs [PAWN_pronoun] used to cope with the overwhelming stress.
LanguageData.Shipcracker37.title: bunker breacher
LanguageData.SoldiersKid55.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was raised in the ancient command bunker where [PAWN_possessive] parents were stationed. [PAWN_pronoun] learned the basics of firearm operations and maintenance from the soldiers on duty and became accustomed to a strict routine and frequent discipline.
LanguageData.SpaceMarine16.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was a shock trooper in an elite army. [PAWN_possessive] job was to blast through fortified positions, gun down the defenders, and capture the place intact. And [PAWN_pronoun] was good at it.
LanguageData.SpaceMarine16.title: breach trooper
LanguageData.SpaceTechnician29.description: [PAWN_nameDef] finally managed to flee [PAWN_possessive] criminal life by getting a maintenance job at a nearby relay station. [PAWN_pronoun] performed a wide range of repair and construction work, helped with basic research, and often defused co-workers' arguments. [PAWN_pronoun] never liked doing art.
LanguageData.SpaceTechnician29.title: relay technician
LanguageData.StarshipJanitor33.description: While other residents slept through long stretches in a sealed government bunker, [PAWN_nameDef] had to wake up at periodic intervals to perform inspections, check the life-support systems, and oil the maintenance robots.
LanguageData.StarshipJanitor33.title: bunker janitor
LanguageData.Taxonomist0.description: [PAWN_nameDef] traveled from region to region, studying and classifying the plant and animal life [PAWN_pronoun] found in the hope of creating a complete catalogue.
LanguageData.TestSubject15.description: In the most corrupt old cities, scientists without a moral compass committed unspeakable atrocities in the name of research. [PAWN_nameDef] was kept alone in a sealed facility from birth and subjected to behavioural experiments in an attempt to turn [PAWN_objective] into a perfect super-soldier.
LanguageData.UrbworldDrone32.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked as a mindless construction hand in a massive company town. Though [PAWN_pronoun] is now free from the brutal social conditioning [PAWN_pronoun] was subjected to, [PAWN_pronoun] remains incapable of creative thought and leadership.
LanguageData.UrbworldDrone32.title: city drone
LanguageData.UrbworldEntrepreneur14.description: In the old corporate cities, most people suffered. But someone had to run the companies. \n[PAWN_nameDef] learned the skills of the trade, greasing palms and balancing technical analysis with politics. [PAWN_pronoun] became a sociointellectual machine.
LanguageData.UrbworldEntrepreneur14.title: city entrepreneur
LanguageData.UrbworldPolitican92.description: It is no secret that the companies own much of the old cities, but someone has to take the bribes. [PAWN_nameDef] was one such figurehead. \n[PAWN_pronoun] learned how to manipulate the hopes and dreams of the people while living comfortably in a penthouse.
LanguageData.UrbworldPolitican92.title: city politician
LanguageData.UrbworldRebel56.description: Most people around [PAWN_nameDef] lived under constant corporate surveillance and propaganda feeds. [PAWN_nameDef] joined a rebel faction that rejected modern technology entirely.
LanguageData.UrbworldRebel56.title: city rebel
LanguageData.UrbworldUrchin61.description: The old industrial cities were ancient, deep warrens of rust, poison, and too many people. [PAWN_nameDef] grew up in the dark, unwanted reaches of one of them and had to fight for every scrap of food.
LanguageData.UrbworldUrchin61.title: city urchin
LanguageData.VRDesigner87.description: [PAWN_nameDef] designed virtual reality simulations for wealthy patrons. [PAWN_pronoun] put great effort into the details of [PAWN_possessive] virtual worlds, learning all [PAWN_pronoun] could about plant life to make [PAWN_possessive] landscapes as realistic as possible.
LanguageData.WillCustomAdulthood.description: [PAWN_nameDef] designed elaborate entertainment mazes for wealthy patrons. Even now, [PAWN_pronoun] thinks of little else.
LanguageData.WillCustomChildhood.description: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up in a research camp on a blasted world. [PAWN_possessive] parents were studying mysterious labyrinthine formations beneath the crust, and [PAWN_pronoun] spent most of [PAWN_possessive] time wandering those tunnels and wondering what kind of thing could have created them.
